raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The travel and tourism industry has lost half of an estimated 1.2 million jobs during the pandemic.",
    "Travel spending is expected to near $98 billion in 2021 and $126 billion in 2022, topping $151 billion in 2024.",
    "California's tourism economy was valued at $145 billion in 2019.",
    "Hundreds of thousands of hospitality workers were unemployed during the pandemic.",
    "State and local governments experienced a $6.6 billion loss due to reduced tax revenues from the tourism sector.",
    "The proposed $95 million funding is projected to deliver $35.8 billion in new visitor revenue for California businesses.",
    "The funding proposal is expected to restore over 330,000 jobs in the tourism industry."
  ]
}
```
